title: Campaigns OS Source HTML Manifest v0
description: Producer-authored manifest consumed by Campaigns OS prepare-build. Paths are relative to the source HTML root, not the .campaigns-os directory.

generator.description: Producer identity such as figma-sections-export@1.2.3 or reference-ai-producer@1.0.0.

root.description: Optional producer hint. Manifest page paths still resolve relative to the source root passed to prepare-build.

page_id.description: Active CampaignSpec page id. This is the primary join key.

page_type.description: Optional producer page type used for fallback matching only.

page_url.description: Optional producer/spec route used for fallback matching after Page Kit route normalization.

source_hash.description: Optional sha256 of the source HTML file at manifest generation time.
